subject: Mozi Minute: My Email Template [Use it]
body:
Words I like: You don't need to be smart. You need to be consistent.

Mozi Money Minute: Email Template

Most business owners struggle with email marketing.

They make it too hard.

They use big words.

They write long blocks of text.

But after testing lots of emails, this format works best for me. And yes, you can copy it.

Why this format works:

- It's easy to scan - Short chunks keep busy people reading

- It sticks to one idea - One tip per email stops overwhelm

- It gives before it asks - Value first, pitch later

- It makes people curious - Subject line + quote hook them

- It ends with a joke - PS with a meme keeps them opening next time

People want both: what they know and what's new.

This format gives them both - a pattern they know with fresh tips inside.

Your open rates will climb the first month using this format. It works.

Copy these parts:

- Your version of "Mozi Money Minute:" in your subject line so they know it's you
- Start with a smart tested quote that sets the mood
- Teach one simple tip they can use today (concept + example)
- Make a one line CTA for your stuff
- Sign off fast
- Add a PS with humor about your topic

As promised, value in under a minute.

Copy, paste, cash in,

Alex
